item.title: Smasher HTB (50pts)
item.description: Smasher A friend of mine suggested me this box as a good “inspiration” for a task for our upcomming CTF at BalCCon congress. I was immediately hooked by the idea of setting a web challenge as an entry gate for a binary exploitation challenge. That twist gives it a little bit of ‘real world’ feeling ( not really), and a better path for libc ‘leaking’, unlike ususal ‘here you go, download libc from here’ way.
